parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title System Sequence Diagram: Record vaccine administration
autonumber
actor Nurse
participant ":System" as System

activate Nurse
Nurse -> System : starts recording the administration of a vaccine to a SNS user
activate System
System --> Nurse : requests to select the SNS user
deactivate System

Nurse -> System : selects the SNS user
activate System
System --> Nurse : shows SNS user information (Name, Age and Adverse Reactions) and ask for confirmation
deactivate System

Nurse -> System : confirms the information
activate System
System --> Nurse : requests to select the vaccine to be administered and the lot number
deactivate System

Nurse -> System : selects the vaccine and inputs lot number
activate System
System --> Nurse : shows data and request confirmation
deactivate System

Nurse -> System : confirms the data
activate System
System --> Nurse : informs operation success and asks if should start the recovery period
deactivate System

Nurse -> System : confirms to start the recovery period
activate System
System --> Nurse : after the recovery period, sends SMS message informing the SNS user that he can leave the vaccination center
deactivate System
deactivate Nurse
@enduml
```
